title: In Middle East, Rubio Says ‘No Country’ Can Charge for Hormuz Traffic
summary_full: The secretary of state dismissed Iran’s talk of charging ships to pass through the vital Persian Gulf portal as prohibited under international law.
summary_public: The secretary of state dismissed Iran’s talk of charging ships to pass through the vital Persian Gulf portal as prohibited under international law.
